item.title: Use-case templates (YAML operational profiles)
steps: Define Template struct: name, version, use_case_mapping, personality, security_posture, monitoring, memory_policy, cron_config, autonomy_model, model_routing_strategy, integration_requirements, skill_bundle
Create 6 built-in templates as YAML files in configs/templates/: replace-google-assistant, replace-chatgpt-plus, replace-my-pa, family-hub, research-copilot, founders-ops
Implement template preview: display what integrations are needed, autonomy model, local model requirements, estimated daily cost, and 'day in the life' narrative
Implement template-to-config mapper: generate DeploymentBundle from Template + setup answers
Write unit tests for template loading and config generation
acceptanceCriteria: 6 built-in templates exist with complete operational profiles
Templates load and validate from YAML without error
Template preview shows all relevant info including cost estimates
Templates can tighten but never loosen Layer 1 security baselines
